{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Awakened nail
| introduced = Of Dawn and Darkness
}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Inquisitors]] were excited by the sight of the [[Awakened nail]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c13">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire artifacts]]
